# Internet After Interfaces

> A 17-slide keynote manifesto on machine economies, autonomous transactions, and the post.ui web. Delivered at ClawCamp Human+Tech Week 2026, San Francisco.

The thesis is simple. The web is mutating from human-rendered HTML into machine-readable agentic surfaces. AI agents are becoming the primary consumer of websites. Transactions are becoming autonomous (agent-to-agent, agent-to-merchant). The interface layer is unbundling from the data and action layers. The interface vanishes for agents. It persists for humans.

## Read the deck

- [Deck (HTML)](https://internet-after-interfaces.vercel.app/): full 17-slide presentation, keyboard nav (left/right), URL-hash deeplinks
- [Agent manifest](https://internet-after-interfaces.vercel.app/.well-known/ai-agent.json): machine-readable summary, slide list, license
- [A2A agent card](https://internet-after-interfaces.vercel.app/.well-known/agent-card.json): A2A-protocol card

## Slide list

1. Internet After Interfaces. (title)
2. The Number. More than half of internet traffic is now non-human (Cloudflare CSO, May 2026).
3. The Gap. 200,000 sites tested, fewer than 15 publish an MCP card (Cloudflare Radar, April 2026).
4. The Third Language. The web learned to speak to browsers, then search engines, now to AI agents.
5. The 5-Layer Agentic Web Stack. Discovery, Content, Trust, Execution, A2A.
6. MCP. agent to tool. 10,000+ active public servers. Anthropic to Linux Foundation.
7. A2A. agent to agent. 150+ orgs. Google to Linux Foundation.
8. x402. autonomous transactions. HTTP 402 reserved since the beginning of HTTP. 69,000 agents, 165M txns.
9. WebMCP. browser-side tools via navigator.modelContext. Chrome 146, Edge 147.
10. Production Receipts. Rufus $12B, Sparky +35% AOV, Klarna 853 FTEs, Shopify Renaissance, Adobe +31%.
11. The Honest Cut. Gartner 17%, Humane dead, Rabbit dying, Klarna walked back. Interface vanishes for agents, persists for humans.
12. Exhibit A. Immersive Commons (immersivecommons.com). The agent-native venue, live MCP + A2A + ed25519.
13. Exhibit B. Skew (skew.site). Supply-side flip, LLM as page generator.
14. Exhibit C. Lobsterhoney (lobsterhoney.com). Honeypots for malicious agents.
15. Exhibit D. Agentify (Claude skill). 21-point audit, 5-layer scaffold, isitagentready.com.
16. The 5-Step Starter. Well-known files, Skill, MCP, A2A, x402.
17. Closing. "AI stops being something you ask, and becomes something that does." (a16z Big Ideas 2026).

## Speaker

- Rayyan Zahid
- @supercoolraydude (X)
- Floor 10 · Frontier Tower SF · Immersive Commons

## Event

- ClawCamp Human+Tech Week 2026
- Monday May 11, 2026 · 10am to 5pm
- The Hibernia Bank, San Francisco, CA
- https://clawcamp.us/events/2026-human-tech/

This deck is published under CC-BY-SA-4.0. Agents are welcome to quote, summarize, and cite with attribution to "Rayyan Zahid, Internet After Interfaces, ClawCamp Human+Tech Week 2026."

## Source citations referenced in the deck

- Cloudflare · Introducing the Agent Readiness Score · April 2026 · https://blog.cloudflare.com/agent-readiness/
- Cloudflare · Agents Week 2026 in Review · https://blog.cloudflare.com/agents-week-in-review/
- Anthropic · Donating the Model Context Protocol · Dec 9, 2025 · https://www.anthropic.com/news/donating-the-model-context-protocol-and-establishing-of-the-agentic-ai-foundation
- Linux Foundation · A2A 1-year retrospective · April 2026 · https://www.linuxfoundation.org/press/a2a-protocol-surpasses-150-organizations
- x402.org · https://www.x402.org/
- Stripe · Agentic Commerce Suite · Dec 11, 2025 · https://stripe.com/blog/agentic-commerce-suite
- a16z · Big Ideas 2026: The Agentic Interface · https://a16z.com/podcast/big-ideas-2026-the-agentic-interface/
- Aiia · ai-agent.json spec · March 28, 2026 · https://aiia.ro/spec/ai-agent-json/
- W3C · WebMCP Community Group · https://webmcp.link/
- Gartner · Hype Cycle for Agentic AI · 2026
- MachineBrief · State of AI Agents 2026 · https://www.machinebrief.com/news/state-of-ai-agents-2026-whats-real-whats-hype
